description: Unicorn Solutions provides software and services for the debt collection industry, including its UnicornBOX platform, workflow tools, court-integration products, and related consultancy and operations support. The company focuses on debt collection process automation and integrations for customers in Scandinavia.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for unicorn-solutions.com; the site is a marketing/product website describing debt-collection software and integrations but exposes no documented public API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on this domain.
